taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
core_skills: Software Engineering, Python, Go, Rust, Unit testing
skill_match_scores: Software Engineering:1.0, Python:1.0, Go:1.0, Rust:0.0, Unit testing:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience in Software Engineering, Experience building backend components in Python, Go, or Rust, Experience with unit, integration, and end-to-end testing framework design and implementation, Strong understanding of Kubernetes and the Kubernetes Operator pattern, Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail, Ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams, Knowledge of software development best practices and coding standards
preferred_quals: Familiarity with AI Inference serving and orchestration, Familiarity with AI coding assistants and technologies, Knowledge of ML application optimization and productionization, Ability to design and build cloud-native software systems
core_responsibilities: Ensure the continued stability, scalability, and performance of our AI inference platform, Collaborate with ML Engineers, Product Managers, QA, and DevOps to build the best system for our customers, Work on components built with Python, Go, and Rust across a heterogeneous serving platform, Build and improve testing frameworks and automation to increase our ability to quickly deliver high quality releases to customers, Design new systems, components, and capabilities to solve new and interesting problems in the AI inference space
job_summary: SambaNova is a company focused on generative AI solutions, and they are seeking Software Engineers for their SambaStack platform. The role involves improving the performance, scalability, and reliability of their AI inference platform while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.
